mainModalCaution.content:
The connected device will be able to read all files and folders contained within the internal storage of Prime.
Use the Airlock feature when connecting Prime to non-trusted devices.
mainModalCaution.title: Caution!

mainModalDeleteAreYouSure.content: There is no way to recover files after deletion.
mainModalDeleteAreYouSure.title: Are you sure?

menu.tapAndHold: Tap and hold a file or folder to select it quickly.

createIntro.content:
Passport uses short-range NFC for secure communication. For the best connection, center the Keycard over the camera to form a "T" shape as shown above.

Passport will vibrate when the Keycard is in the correct position.
createIntro.title: NFC Tip

magic.createContent:
To restore from your Magic Backup, you will need any two parts:

1 Keycard + Envoy
or
2 Keycards

We recommend storing your Keycards in separate locations for resilient security.
magic.eraseThirdKeycardContent:
Your third Keycard no longer contains valid backup data. 

Passport will erase this card for future use.
magic.modalDataDetectedContentMasterKey:
This Keycard is part of a backup from a different Master Key.

By continuing, all data will be overwritten.

Are you sure you want to continue?
magic.modalDataDetectedContentPrime:
This Keycard is part of a backup from a different Passport Prime.

By continuing, all data will be overwritten.

Are you sure you want to continue?
magic.modalDataDetectedContentThisPrime:
This Keycard is part of an existing backup set for this Passport Prime.

By continuing, all data will be overwritten.

Are you sure you want to continue?
magic.modalEnvoyErrorContent:
Passport was unable to successfully save to Envoy.

Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.
magic.modalErrorContent:
Passport was unable to successfully save to this Keycard.

Please try again.
magic.modalInvalidDataDetectedContent:
This Keycard contains invalid data. Ensure you are using a Foundation Keycard.

Passport will attempt to overwrite the data on this card.
magic.modalInvalidThirdPartyKeycardContent:
Backup data from a third-party device detected. 
Foundation cannot guarantee the integrity of this backup.   Do you understand the risks and want to continue?

manual.modalBewareContent:
Write down these words on the backup sheet provided. Store the sheet securely and never take a photo of it.

Anyone requesting you expose these words outside of this device will gain full control over your funds. Take care.

appCrash.content: {0} has crashed with the following exit code: {1}.

launcherCrash.content: The launcher has encountered an error with the following message.

mainDevs.content1: For the first time ever, KeyOS enables expanding Passport Prime’s functionality with third-party apps.
mainDevs.content2: Apps on KeyOS can be anything – add cold storage to your mobile wallet, integrate with your password manager, bring your logo and UI for the best user experience.
mainDevs.content3: The Developer SDK is coming later in 2026. Please share with your favorite apps and services!

backupMagicMain1.subheader:
Create a secure and resilient backup of your Passport Master Key.

Your Master Key will be split into three parts. Two will be stored on Keycards.

The third will be stored on Envoy, encrypted, and backed up to your Apple or Google account.

backupManualMain.subheader:
Create a {0} out of {1} backup with the three Keycards or save your seed words by writing them down.

Additional backups can be created later in Settings.

errorConnectionLost.content: Ensure your Passport is powered on and near your phone.

errorSecurityCheckFailed.content: This device may not be genuine or may have been tampered with during shipping. Please contact support.

errorSecurityCheckPending.content: Envoy failed to connect to Foundation servers. Please retry the check on Envoy.

importSettings.content: Would you like to restore an existing Settings & Data Backup File from a Passport Prime?

importSettingsModalWrongBackupFile.content: The provided Settings & Data Backup File does not correspond to the restored Master Key.

inititatedPrime.content:
Envoy detected that this Passport has already been initiated.

How would you like to proceed?

magicBackupFound.content: Restoring your encrypted settings and data from the Foundation server

magicBackupFoundError.content: There was an error when trying to communicate with the Foundation server to restore your encrypted settings and data.

main.subheader:
Secure your entire digital life.
By proceeding, you acknowledge and accept the Terms of Use.

masterKeyDeleted.content:
To ensure your security, Passport has erased its Master Key. Your data is still preserved in an encrypted state. 

Restore access by providing the Master Key, or erase all data from this device.

masterKeyDeletedErase.content: Are you sure you want to delete all data on this device?

masterKeyDeletedRestore.content: Choose a method to provide the Master Key.

masterKeyDeletedRestoreModalWrongKey.content: The provided Master Key does not match this device’s previous key.

masterKeyDeletedRestorePairingFirst.content: To retrieve the Envoy part of your Master Key backup, Passport needs to reconnect with Envoy.

recoverEncryptedBackupDetected.content:
Passport found an encrypted settings and data backup stored on the Foundation server.

Do you want to restore it?

recoverFileBackupCodeError.subheader: Backup code incorrect. Please try again.

recoverRestoreCardModalEmptyKeycard.content: This Keycard has no data stored. Please try a different one.

recoverRestoreCardModalKeycardDoesNotMat.content:
This Keycard belongs to a different master key backup than the first Keycard presented.

Please try again with a different Keycard.

recoverSuccessModalNewDevice.subheader:
The backup used to restore came from a different Passport Prime.

For maximum redundancy, we strongly suggest you create a new backup now.

recoverWords.incorrectTryAgain: One or more of your seed words are incorrect. Please review and try again.
recoverWords.title: Seed Words

scanModalEnvoyCanceled.content: Onboarding canceled by Envoy. Tap below to start again.

scanModalPassportDisconnected.content: Move Passport and your phone closer to each other to attempt  reconnection from Envoy. If that fails, tap below to start over.

seedIntro.content:
The Master Key is the primary secret that protects everything on Passport.

Have Passport create a new one, or restore an existing backup using Keycards or seed words.

seedMain.content:
The Master Key protects your money and all personal data stored on Passport.

Never share the Master Key or backup outside of Passport. Doing so can result in total loss of funds and data.

seedRecoverModal.content1:
Are you sure you want to restore an existing backup or seed?
Passport will create a secure Master Key to safeguard your entire digital life.
seedRecoverModal.content2: Warning: we recommend creating a new Master Key and migrating your funds to Passport.
seedRecoverModal.header: We Recommend a New Master Key

setPin.content:
Secure your Passport with a 6-12 digit PIN.

Please record your PIN  somewhere safe.

advanced.eraseAllDataContent: Permanently erase all data and settings. This action cannot be undone.
advanced.firmwareRecoveryContent: Recover from an official firmware version. Your personal data will not be affected.
advanced.title: Recovery

advancedModalCriticalRecovery.content:
The recovery archive contains components such as bootloader or the Recovery OS itself.
Do not reboot or shut down the device during recovery process.

advancedModalLowBattery.content: Please connect the device to a charger and ensure it has at least 50% charge before proceeding with the recovery.

eraseEncryptedModal.content: This will completely erase all user files stored on the encrypted drive and Airlock.

formattingAirlock.content:
The Airlock file system is corrupt and needs to be formatted. This will permanently erase all data inside the Airlock.

Do not format the Airlock if you want to attempt data recovery by connecting to an external device via USB.

formattingDevice.content:
Formatting the encrypted storage, this may take a few moments.

Please don't power off your device

formattingRequired.content:
The encrypted storage is unformatted.
Perhaps it was previously encrypted using a different Master Key.

Formatting the encrypted storage using the current Master Key will permanently erase all data previously stored, including the airlock.

progress.subheader: Do not shut down your device.

verificationFailed.firmwareDevKey: We cannot recover from firmware signed by a custom Developer Pubkey.

The next screen will show your seed words.
Anyone requesting you expose these words outside of this device will gain full control over your funds. Take care.

backupModalDisableMagic.subheader:
This will delete the Master Key part stored on Envoy and backed up to your Apple or Google account.

Your Settings & Data Backup will also be erased from Foundation servers.

Create a new backup of this data before it is deleted.

backupModalEnableMagic.subheader:
Create a secure and resilient backup of your Passport Master Key.

Your Master Key will be split into three parts. Two will be stored on physical Keycards.

The third will be stored on Envoy, encrypted, and backed up to your Apple or Google account.

backupModalEnvoyDisabled.content:
Magic Backups must be enabled on Envoy before creating a Magic Backup on Passport.

Open the Envoy menu, then tap Backups.

backupModalEraseDevice.subheader:
To restore a backup, this device first needs to be erased.

Are you sure you want to continue?

connectionDoneModal.subheader:
Are you sure you want to disconnect the QuantumLink connection to Envoy?

Doing so will prevent some Passport apps and features from functioning correctly.

createBackupFile.content: The Device Backup is encrypted by your Master Key and contains a copy of all settings and data.

eraseDevice.subheader: Are you sure you want to delete all data on this device?  This includes the Master Key, device PIN, and all app data.

eraseDeviceAreYouSure.subheader:
Your Passport is about to be erased. 
Continuing without a recent backup could result in loss of funds and critical app data.

eraseDeviceAreYouSureSettingsData.subheader:
You are about to erase your Passport and the encrypted Settings & Data Backup from the Foundation server. 

Continuing without a recent external backup could result in loss of funds and critical app data.

eraseDeviceBackup.removeSettingsData:
Remove Settings & Data Backup 
from the Foundation server
eraseDeviceBackup.subheader: Without a recent backup, erasing this device could result in loss of funds or critical app data.

modalMagicBackupStatus.content:
Magic Backups must be re-enabled on Envoy to ensure your data is secure. Once complete, tap retry.

Alternatively, Magic Backups on Passport can be disabled by creating an advanced backup.

noConnection.message: Make sure Bluetooth is enabled on Passport and your phone, and both devices are nearby.

saveSeedtoCards.subheader: This will save your Master Key and overwrite any existing data on your Keycards.

securityWords.content: Write down these words and store them securely.
securityWords.introduction:
Security Words act as an early warning for device tampering. 

Upon entering the first four digits of your PIN, Passport will display two unique words. If you see words that you do not recognize, do not enter the remainder of your PIN.

We recommend you write them down and store them securely.
securityWords.title: Security Words

settingsDataBackup.content: The Settings & Data Backup is encrypted by your Master Key and contains a copy of all settings and data.
settingsDataBackup.title: Settings & Data Backup

PassphraseModal.content:
A passphrase acts as a second layer of security to protect your Bitcoin.

To access Bitcoin protected by a passphrase, you must reenter the exact same characters.

It is crucial to back up your passphrase to avoid loss of funds.
